div1.entryFree:
Several, subst. (used only in the plural) 1) individual, a single person: not noted but by some --s of head-piece extraordinary, Wint. I, 2, 226.
2) that which concerns a particular person or question: the --s and unhidden passages of his true titles, H5 I, 1, 86. --s and generals of grace, Troil. I, 3, 180.
